questionHtml:
Three identical capacitors are connected together as shown.

What is the order of increasing total capacitance for these arrangements?

A.  P, S, R, Q

B.  Q, R, S, P

C.  P, R, S, Q

D.  Q, S, R, P

meta.title: Three identical capacitors are connected together as shown. What is the order of increasing total capacitance for these arrangements? A. P, S, R, Q B. Q, R, S, P C. P, R, S, Q D. Q
